name: agentic-solid-conformance
description: Language-neutral conformance test vectors for the agentic-accountability specs: the ODRL Agent-Delegation Profile, Agent Authorization Credentials (four-phase verification), and the A2A RDF extension (RDFC-1.0 protocol hashing + the no-silent-downgrade handshake).

status.summary: Golden inputs/expected-outputs an independent implementation must reproduce to claim conformance. Vectors are self-describing JSON/Turtle with no @jeswr code dependency; tools/ holds the (local-tooling) generator + consistency checker pinned to the reference implementations.
